query:
SELECT codEst, COUNT(*) as total, COALESCE(SUM(CAST(comissao AS DECIMAL(10,4))), 0) as totalComissao
FROM pro_rata 
GROUP BY codEst
ORDER BY totalComissao DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user axRHbWZqKReZrAb.b2cf85c9ad94 --database SMgJn6AGQCNfDq7mPzPqc9 --execute SELECT codEst, COUNT(*) as total, COALESCE(SUM(CAST(comissao AS DECIMAL(10,4))), 0) as totalComissao
FROM pro_rata 
GROUP BY codEst
ORDER BY totalComissao DESC;
